hero.subtitle: SmartBiz is the all-in-one platform built for Arabic and English teams. Manage, collaborate, and grow — without switching tools.

features.title: Everything your team needs
features.subtitle: One platform. Every tool. Built for the Arab world and beyond.
features.card1_desc: Live dashboards that update instantly. Track KPIs, spot trends, and make decisions backed by data — not guesswork.
features.card2_desc: Built-in chat, task boards, and file sharing. Your team stays aligned whether they're in Riyadh, Cairo, or London.
features.card3_desc: SOC 2 certified, end-to-end encrypted, and GDPR compliant. Your data stays yours — always.
features.card4_desc: Automate repetitive tasks with no-code workflows. Save hours every week and focus on what matters.
features.card5_desc: Every feature works perfectly in Arabic and English, with full RTL support built in from day one.
features.card6_desc: Connect to 200+ tools including Slack, Salesforce, and SAP. Your stack, unified.

how.title: Up and running in minutes
how.step1_desc: Sign up and set your preferred language. Your entire team can use their own language independently.
how.step2_desc: Add members, assign roles, and set permissions. Works across Arabic and English speakers seamlessly.
how.step3_desc: Use dashboards, tasks, and reports — all in real time, in the language your team is most comfortable with.

testimonials.title: Loved by teams across the region
testimonials.t1_quote: SmartBiz cut our reporting time by 60%. The Arabic interface is as polished as the English one — that alone was the deciding factor for us.
testimonials.t2_quote: Finally a platform that doesn't treat Arabic as an afterthought. Our team adopted it in days, not months.
testimonials.t3_quote: The automation features saved us 15 hours a week. The bilingual support means our whole team — Arabic and English speakers — works in one place.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.
pricing.plan1_desc: Perfect for small teams getting started.
pricing.plan2_desc: For growing teams that need more power.

footer.description: The all-in-one platform for Arabic and English teams.
